zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Ier comte de Flandre於大約1035年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut24歲，母親Adèle de France27歲。他於大約1063年與Gertrud Billung von Sachsen結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1093年10月13日在德國賀瑟可萊斯 阿道夫_享年59歲，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟卡塞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Ier comte de Flandre于大约1035年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut24岁，母亲Adèle de France27岁。他于大约1063年与Gertrud Billung von Sachsen结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1093年10月13日在德国賀瑟可萊斯 阿道夫_享年59岁，埋葬在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇賀瑟卡塞。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Ier comte de Flandre was born about 1035, in Normandy, France, his father, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, was 24 and his mother, Adèle de France, was 27. He married Gertrud Billung von Sachsen about 1063. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 13 October 1093, in Kassel, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 59, and was buried in Cassel, Hesse, Holy Roman Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Ier comte de Flandre est né environ 1035, à Normandie, France, son père, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Adèle de France, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Gertrud Billung von Sachsen environ 1063. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 octobre 1093, à Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Cassel, Hessen, Saint-Empire romain.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Ier comte de Flandre um 1035 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut 24 und seine Mutter Adèle de France 27. Er hat um 1063 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 13. Oktober 1093 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Deutschland und wurde in Cassel, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier comte de Flandre è nato il circa 1035 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Adèle de France, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Gertrud Billung von Sachsen circa 1063. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 ottobre 1093, nel Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Germania, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Cassel, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Ier comte de Flandreが約1035年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainautは24歳，母Adèle de Franceは27歳であった。約1063年にGertrud Billung von Sachsenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1093年10月13日にドイツヘセンクレイス カセルで59歳で死去し，ヘイリジェズ ルoミシェス レイチヘセンカセルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Ier comte de Flandre(이)가 대략 1035년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle de France(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1063년 Gertrud Billung von Sachsen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1093년 10월 13일 독일 헤센 크레이스 카셀에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 헤센 캐셀에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Ier comte de Flandre nasceu aproximadamente 1035, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de France, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Gertrud Billung von Sachsen aproximadamente 1063. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de outubro de 1093, em Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Alemanha, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Cassel, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Ier comte de Flandre родился около 1035 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Adèle de France, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrud Billung von Sachsen около 1063 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 13 октября 1093 г. в местности крис кассел, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности кассел, Гессен, хилигесь рoмищесь раич.

sm.BET 1071 AND 1093: mai le 1071 e o'o I le 1093

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Ier comte de Flandre nació aproximadamente 1035, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Adèle de France, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Gertrud Billung von Sachsen aproximadamente 1063. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de octubre de 1093, en Kreis Kassel, Hessen, Alemania, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Cassel, Hessen, Heiliges Römisches Reich.
